subject: [SDNC] Correct config directories for ODL
commit_message:
[SDNC] Correct config directories for ODL

SDNC entrypoint script sets up several environment variables
including configfiles dir. Recent addition of AAF configfiles
broke expected path for used properties files. This could be
noticed with example error from karaf logs:
org.onap.ccsdk.sli.core.sli.SvcLogicException: Cannot read property file: /opt/app/osaaf/local/generic-resource-api-dg.properties: /opt/app/osaaf/local/generic-resource-api-dg.properties (No such file or directory)

Issue-ID: SDNC-1147
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ifcfde9abef1c12a7b8d1009f346d313b8fe57f44

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 4 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This change is ready for review.

Patch Set 1:

While I've tested this change in local environment and it helped with the issue described here and in jira, I'm not sure if it won't break any AAF-related functionality? If anyone can verify it - that would be great.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4386/

Patch Set 1:

Hi Konrad,
thanks for the patch!

Let's wait for gating results  and Dan +1 but there's no "OOM" issue on my side
